description: Dino (DINO) emerged in 2024 on Base as a community-driven dinosaur-themed memecoin fueled by nostalgia, meme virality, and rapid grassroots growth. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 DINO gives original DINO holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, full AI contract capability, turning DINO into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Dino
